2605.09366.title: Towards a Virtual Neuroscientist: Autonomous Neuroimaging Analysis via Multi-Agent Collaboration
2605.09366.paper_summary: Transforming neuroimaging data into clinically actionable biomarkers is a knowledge-intensive and labor-intensive process. Standardized workflows such as fMRIPrep have improved robustness and efficiency, but they are statically configured and cannot reason about downstream objectives, deliberate over alternative strategies, or close the loop between intermediate evidence and subsequent decisions in the way a human researcher would. This lack of closed-loop adaptation often leaves domain experts trapped in a cycle of manual trial-and-error to tune parameters and remediate pipeline failures, severely constraining the scalability of clinical biomarker development. To bridge this gap, we introduce NIAgent, a multi-agent system for autonomous end-to-end neuroimaging analysis. Unlike conventional flat tool-calling agents, NIAgent adopts a code-centric execution paradigm where specialist agents collaboratively synthesize and optimize executable programs over composable domain-specific primitives. This design enables robust, long-horizon workflow construction that adapts dynamically to runtime observations. Furthermore, we propose a hierarchical verification framework for autonomous quality control, integrating cohort-level metric screening with agentic visual inspection to drive evidence-grounded workflow remediation. Experiments on ADHD-200 and ADNI demonstrate that NIAgent outperforms standard workflow-based baselines in predictive performance while exhibiting sophisticated agentic behaviors, including strategy exploration and adaptive refinement.
2605.09366.paper_summary_zh: 將神經影像數據轉化為臨床可行的生物標記是一個知識密集且勞動密集的過程。標準化工作流程如 fMRIPrep 提高了穩健性和效率，但它們是靜態配置的，無法對下游目標進行推理、考慮替代策略或像人類研究者一樣在中間證據和後續決策之間閉合循環。這種缺乏閉環適應的情況常常使領域專家陷入手動試錯的循環中，以調整參數和修復管道故障，嚴重限制了臨床生物標記開發的可擴展性。為了彌補這一差距，我們引入了 NIAgent，一個用於自主端到端神經影像分析的多代理系統。與傳統的平面工具調用代理不同，NIAgent 採用以代碼為中心的執行範式，專家代理協同合成和優化可執行程序，基於可組合的特定領域原語。這一設計使得能夠構建穩健的長期工作流程，並根據運行時觀察進行動態調整。此外，我們提出了一個層級驗證框架，用於自主質量控制，將群體級別的指標篩選與代理的視覺檢查相結合，以推動基於證據的工作流程修正。在 ADHD-200 和 ADNI 上的實驗表明，NIAgent 在預測性能上優於基於標準工作流程的基準，同時展現出複雜的代理行為，包括策略探索和自適應精煉。
2605.09366.author: Keqi Han et.al.
2605.09366.authors: Keqi Han, Songlin Zhao, Yao Su, Lifang He, Carl Yang
